summary: Joel Spolsky briefly introduces Paul Kenny, a sales training expert who regularly speaks at the Business of Software conference. He notes that both Red Gate and Fog Creek Software hire Kenny to train their sales teams. The post primarily serves to share a video of Kenny's 2009 conference talk and promote the upcoming 2010 Business of Software conference in Boston.
key_points: Paul Kenny is a recurring speaker at the Business of Software conference specializing in high-tech sales
Both Red Gate and Fog Creek rely on Kenny for sales team training and organizational development
The post promotes the next Business of Software conference scheduled for October 2010 in Boston
money_quotes: He's an expert on sales, especially high tech sales, and both Red Gate and Fog Creek hire him all the time to train our sales teams and build our sales organization.
key_insight: Even deeply technical software companies like Fog Creek invest heavily in professional sales training and organizational development.
